'''Tasin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] who ran the [[Jatayus Trading Consortium]].

Tasin was originally a promising trader until [[Sprax]], the heir apparent to Jatayus Trading Consortium, left to work for [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. Tasin eventually became the new head of JTC and organized very lucrative deals with [[Jatayus Outbound]] and XTS. Tasin also supported numerous [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] activities along the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], most of which Sprax was involved with.

She worked closely with Sprax throughout her tenure as head of JTC, and although they were not romantically involved, they were very good friends.
